metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced culinary techniques, professional kitchen skills, and menu planning expertise. This course emphasizes quality food preparation, food safety, menu costing, nutrition, and engagement in culinary practicum experiences in professional kitchen settings.
metadata.general_description: Advanced culinary techniques, menu planning, food costing, and industry practicum experiences.

big_ideas.statement: Culinary arts combines technique, creativity, and science to transform ingredients into memorable dining experiences
big_ideas.elaboration: Professional cooking integrates knife skills, cooking methods, flavor development, and food science with artistic presentation.

big_ideas.statement: Professional kitchen operations require organization, safety, efficiency, and teamwork to deliver quality service
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful kitchens depend on clear hierarchies, standardized procedures, food safety practices, and coordinated communication.

big_ideas.statement: Menu planning integrates culinary creativity, nutritional considerations, cost management, and market demand
big_ideas.elaboration: Effective menus balance quality ingredients, preparation time, pricing, and customer preferences to ensure financial viability.

big_ideas.statement: Culinary professionals contribute to community food culture, wellness, and sustainable food systems
big_ideas.elaboration: Chefs and food service professionals influence dining trends, promote healthy eating, and support local and sustainable sourcing.

competencies.raw: Design menus that balance flavor, nutrition, cost, and market appeal
i_can_statements: I can create diverse menus considering ingredients, cuisines, and dietary needs
I can design seasonal and themed menus
I can ensure nutritional balance and special dietary accommodations
I can develop menus within target food costs

competencies.raw: Design recipes and cooking techniques for consistent quality
i_can_statements: I can standardize recipes with precise measurements and instructions
I can scale recipes for different serving sizes
I can select appropriate cooking methods for ingredients
I can develop recipes that maintain quality under service conditions

competencies.raw: Design kitchen operations and systems for efficiency and safety
i_can_statements: I can design kitchen layouts and workflow
I can develop mise en place systems and station assignments
I can create food safety and sanitation procedures
I can design systems for inventory and food storage

competencies.raw: Design plated dishes and presentations that enhance the dining experience
i_can_statements: I can develop plate designs considering color, texture, and balance
I can select appropriate plating techniques and equipment
I can create garnishes and finishing touches
I can design food presentations for different service styles

competencies.raw: Apply knife skills and basic cooking techniques with precision and safety
i_can_statements: I can perform knife cuts safely and efficiently
I can execute basic cooking methods: sautéing, roasting, braising, steaming
I can apply heat and timing appropriately
I can maintain knife skills and equipment maintenance

competencies.raw: Apply advanced cooking techniques to create complex dishes
i_can_statements: I can prepare stocks, sauces, and mother sauces
I can prepare and cook proteins using advanced techniques
I can prepare vegetables, grains, and starches professionally
I can execute baking and pastry techniques

competencies.raw: Apply food safety and sanitation standards consistently
i_can_statements: I can follow HACCP principles and food safety regulations
I can maintain proper food storage and temperature control
I can prevent cross-contamination and allergen hazards
I can implement proper cleaning and sanitization procedures

competencies.raw: Apply menu costing and food cost management principles
i_can_statements: I can calculate ingredient costs and portion costs
I can determine menu pricing based on food costs
I can manage food waste and minimize costs
I can track and analyze food cost percentages

competencies.raw: Use kitchen equipment and technology effectively
i_can_statements: I can operate various commercial kitchen equipment
I can use food preparation tools and machinery safely
I can maintain and troubleshoot equipment
I can adopt new culinary technologies

competencies.raw: Use digital tools for recipe management and menu planning
i_can_statements: I can use recipe development software
I can manage recipes and menus digitally
I can calculate nutritional information
I can create digital recipe cards and standardized formats

competencies.raw: Use point-of-sale and inventory management systems
i_can_statements: I can use POS systems for ordering and service
I can manage inventory using digital tools
I can track food costs and generate reports
I can use suppliers' ordering systems

competencies.raw: Use multimedia for culinary presentations and communication
i_can_statements: I can photograph and present food professionally
I can use video to demonstrate cooking techniques
I can create culinary content and recipes
I can use social media for food business promotion

areas.name: Advanced Cooking Techniques and Methods
topics: Sautéing, roasting, braising, and steaming techniques

areas.name: Professional Kitchen Operations and Safety
topics: Food safety standards and HACCP principles

areas.name: Food Costing and Culinary Entrepreneurship
topics: Food cost calculation and percentage management
